titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/222

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=172 status=live modified=2022-11-01 13:06:58.07031+00 | translation moa=173 status=live modified=2022-11-01 13:06:59.137129+00

p.cl: .R. dei gratia sancti andree humilis minister  Omnibus sancte matris ęcclesie filiis  salutem .  benedictionem.

Innotescat tam presentibus quam futuris nos concessisse  dedisse ecclesiam de uilla leuing sicut
ipse concessit Abbati  canonicis de sancta cruce . salua reuerentia ęcclesie sancti andreę   episcopali dignitate .
cum omnibus rebus eidem ęcclesie iuste pertinentibus .

His presentibus testibus . T. archidiacono . A. decano . M. Thoma . W.
capellano . Magistro . H. R. de boilestunea.
Robert by the grace of God humble servant of Saint Andrew to all sons of Holy Mother Church, Greeting and blessing:

Let it be known by those present as well as those to come that we have granted and given the church in the toun of Living [Livingston] as he [Living] himself granted to the abbot and canons of Holyrood, reserving reverence to the church of St Andrews and the episcopal dignity, with all things justly belonging to the same church.
With these witnesses present, Thorald the archdeacon, Aiulf the dean, Master Thomas, William the chaplain, Master Herbert, Ralph de Boileston.
